name: group_by_calendar_channels
description: Group Calendar Channels records by one or two fields and compute an aggregate (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, etc.). Use for questions like "how many deals per stage?" or "total revenue by company". Returns groups with dimension values and aggregate results, ordered by the aggregate value.

groupBy.description: Fields to group by (max 2). Each entry must be an object with exactly one field key. Examples: {"status": true}, {"companyId": true}, {"createdAt": {"granularity": "MONTH", "timeZone": "UTC"}}. Available: createdAt (date), updatedAt (date), handle, visibility, isContactAutoCreationEnabled, contactAutoCreationPolicy, isSyncEnabled, syncCursor, syncStatus, syncStage, syncStageStartedAt (date), syncedAt (date), throttleFailureCount, connectedAccountId.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

weekStartDay.description: First day of week (MONDAY, SUNDAY, SATURDAY). Only used when granularity is WEEK.

timeZone.description: IANA timezone for date groupings (e.g. "America/New_York"). Default: UTC.

aggregateOperation.description: Aggregate operation to apply per group. Default: COUNT. Any operation other than COUNT requires aggregateFieldName.

aggregateFieldName.description: Field to aggregate. Required for any operation other than COUNT. Available fields: id, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt, createdBy, updatedBy, position, searchVector, handle, visibility, isContactAutoCreationEnabled, contactAutoCreationPolicy, isSyncEnabled, syncCursor, syncStatus, syncStage, syncStageStartedAt, syncedAt, throttleFailureCount.

limit.description: Maximum number of groups to return (default: 50, max: 100).

orderBy.description: Order groups by aggregate value. DESC (default) gives "top N" behavior.

is.description: Check for missing or empty values. Use "NULL" to find records with no value, "NOT_NULL" for records with a value
